'''Port Pevaria''' was a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] run by a crime syndicate. During the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] operatives on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] kept close tabs on the spaceport. [[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]] officers began their search for the ''[[Love Commander]]'' there.
